task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Contact Book** (Level 6)

Build a contacts API. Contacts table with name (required), email (must be valid email, unique), phone, notes. Full CRUD. POST /api/contacts validates email format and uniqueness. GET /api/contacts lists all.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Contacts table:
  name, required
  email, required, unique, email
  phone
  notes

# Your endpoints here

```

The app must pass these HTTP tests:
  - POST /api/contacts
final_source:
build for javascript backend
database is local memory

create a Contacts table:
  name, required
  email, required, unique, email
  phone
  notes

when user calls GET /api/contacts:
  contacts = get all Contacts
  send back contacts

when user sends contact to /api/contacts:
  validate contact:
    name must not be empty
    email must match email format
  existing = look up Contacts where email is contact's email
  guard existing is empty or 'Email already exists'
  saved = save contact to Contacts
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/contacts/:id:
  contact = look up Contact with this id
  send back contact

when user sends changes to /api/contacts/:id:
  validate changes:
    email must match email format
  existing = look up Contacts where email is changes's email
  guard existing is empty or 'Email already exists'
  save changes to Contact with this id
  send back 'updated'

  delete the Contact with this id
  delete Contact with this id
  send back 'deleted'
